title: Vicloon Baby Bandana Dribble Bibs Drool Bibs, 10pc Infant Teething Soft and Absorbent with Adjustable Snaps, Bib Set for Unisex Newborn Toddlers Aged 0-36 Months
features: 👶 10-Pack Stylish Bibs: The baby bandana bib contains 10 U-shaped bibs. Each hijab bib has a cute pattern for boys and girls. Helps keep mom's drooling/teething baby dry and tidy, a unique baby gift for new parents.

👶 Skin-friendly and Absorbent: The baby drool bibs are made of crystal velvet on the front, and covered with a waterproof membrane on the back, which is soft and skin-friendly, while instantly absorbing and waterproofing. Can absorb baby's saliva faster, very suitable for teething baby!

👶 Plastic Snap Design: Each baby bandana bib comes with 1 plastic nickel-free snap strap, the plastic buttons are very strong, the bib stays in place and makes it not easy for your baby to pull them off.

👶 Easy to Clean: These baby teething bibs are machine washable or hand washable, lay flat to dry or tumble dry on low heat. Do not add bleach. Iron at low temperature. We recommend that you hand wash in water below 30°C.

👶 A Must for Every Parent: Moms love these modern, fun and functional bibs. These bibs are cute and stylish to match with outfits. Perfect for feeding, playing and teething at home or outdoors. Every parent loves a baby hijab bib. This is a great set of newborn gifts.
description: Product Description Our drool bibs with different types of prints for baby Boys and Girls. Our bibs are perfect for all occasions. Our baby bibs are made of safe material, machine washable or hand washable, no fading or deformation. Our bibs absorb baby's saliva faster than other bibs, help keep baby's clothes dry and are perfect for teething babies. The baby saliva towel is attached by a plastic snap button, which is nickel free, which protects the baby's skin and prevents allergic reactions. The front of the bib is made of crystal velvet, and the back is covered with a waterproof membrane, which is soft and skin-friendly, while instantly absorbing and waterproof.
